comparison.title: Creating a project today is <strike>complex</strike>
comparison.subtitle: Dispersed tools, difficult-to-create documents, and unclear processes make it hard to transform an idea into a concrete project. Silicon Plan simplifies everything into one path.

without.title: Scattered tools
without.description: Jumping between docs, spreadsheets, and design tools.

without.title: Manual work
without.description: Spending hours formatting and writing from scratch.

without.title: Confusing process
without.description: No clear step-by-step guidance on what to do next.

with.title: Guided tour
with.description: A clear path from idea to presentation.

with.title: Clear structure
with.description: Everything organized in one centralized platform.

roadmap.title: A clear path to build your project
roadmap.subtitle: You don't have to know where to start. The platform guides you through every step.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.subtitle: In just a few steps you have a complete structure of your project.

steps.title: Create your project
steps.description: Start by giving your idea a name and defining the basic scope.

steps.title: Enter information
steps.description: Answer guided questions about your market, product, and goals.

steps.title: Generate documents
steps.description: AI instantly creates structured documents based on your inputs.

steps.title: Improve your project
steps.description: Refine, edit, and get professional support to perfect your plan.

testimonials.title: Trusted by founders and consultants worldwide
testimonials.subtitle: Real results from real collaborations

topRow.name: Sofia Martinez
topRow.quote: I found exactly the expert I needed. The session was structured, practical, and directly applicable to our startup.

topRow.name: Liam Turner
topRow.quote: Working inside the platform made everything easier — from planning to refining our pitch deck. Highly recommend.

topRow.name: Olivia Bennett
topRow.quote: Great experience. Clear feedback, fast iteration, and real impact on our fundraising process.

topRow.name: Marcus Reed
topRow.quote: After two sessions we had a clear roadmap and could completely rethink our go-to-market materials.

topRow.name: Aria Chen
topRow.quote: The advice was sharp and practical. I shipped a much stronger pitch deck the same week.

bottomRow.name: Daniel Turner
bottomRow.quote: Silicon Plan makes it easy to work with motivated founders. Sessions are well-structured, and having documents inside saves a lot of time.

bottomRow.name: James Walker
bottomRow.quote: The structured approach to sessions and document collaboration really improves the quality of consulting.

bottomRow.name: Emma Collins
bottomRow.quote: I appreciate how structured the sessions are. It helps both me and the founder stay focused and get results faster.

bottomRow.name: Ava Thompson
bottomRow.quote: Great tool for collaborating on living documents. It removes a lot of friction between consultants and founders.

bottomRow.name: Hugo Laurent
bottomRow.quote: Easy onboarding, clear handoffs, and the founders show up prepared. Best workflow I've used.

whoAreWe.title: Who we are
whoAreWe.description: SiliconPlan is a digital platform that helps aspiring entrepreneurs, professionals, and organizations transform an idea into a structured, presentable, and financeable project.
bullets: Today, doing business requires multidisciplinary skills, diverse tools, and often high costs.
SiliconPlan combines all of this in a single, accessible, and guided platform.
whoAreWe.capabilitiesHeading: Through an approach based on artificial intelligence, a structured methodology, and human support, we enable users to develop
whoAreWe.cardDescription: Access Business Plans, Canvas models, and Pitch Decks directly inside the platform.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: We envision an ecosystem where every valid business idea can be developed, validated, and funded, regardless of initial resources.
bullets: Build and validate ideas with AI support
Connect with experts to accelerate growth
One platform for building and scaling
vision.capabilitiesHeading: We are the go-to platform for project creation and development, integrating:

cards.title: Technology
cards.description: Leverage AI-powered tools to build, structure, and validate your business ideas faster.

cards.title: Skills
cards.description: Access real expertise from experienced consultants across strategy, product, and growth.

cards.title: Training
cards.description: Learn through guided workflows and practical insights designed for real-world execution.

cards.title: Access to capital
cards.description: Prepare your business for funding and connect with the right opportunities to scale.

mission.title: Our Mission
paragraphs: Our mission is to make business creation and development more accessible, faster, and more effective.
We want to break down the barriers that currently prevent many ideas from becoming solid businesses.
mission.capabilitiesHeading: With SiliconPlan, anyone can build a solid business plan, even starting from scratch.

cards.title: Lack of skills
cards.description: Access expert guidance and step-by-step AI tools to build with confidence.

cards.title: High consulting costs
cards.description: Work with consultants in a flexible, affordable format.

cards.title: Lack of guided tools
cards.description: Use structured workflows designed for real startup development.

cards.title: Funding challenges
cards.description: Prepare your business and connect with funding opportunities.

values.title: Our Values
paragraphs: We believe everyone should have the opportunity to turn an idea into a business venture.
We reduce barriers, complexity, and costs, making business tools accessible to everyone.

cards.title: Structure and method
cards.description: Doing business isn't just creativity: it's method. We offer a clear, guided process that helps users develop solid projects, step by step.

cards.title: Useful innovation
cards.description: We use artificial intelligence to simplify complex processes. Not to replace human thought, but to enhance it.

cards.title: Collaborazione
cards.description: We believe in the value of expertise. That's why we integrate technology and consulting, creating an ecosystem that connects businesses and professionals.

cards.title: Continuous growth
cards.description: We're constantly evolving. We improve the platform based on user feedback and market developments. We want to contribute to a stronger entrepreneurial ecosystem, where more ideas can become concrete reality.
